---
title: "EPPS 6323 Assignments"
---

Below are the links to my coursework for **EPPS 6323 – Knowledge Mining**.

## Assignments

- [Assignment 01: Brush up R and Quarto](Assignment01.html)
- [Assignment 02: Prompt Exercise](Assignment02.html)
- [Assignment 03: ML exercise](Assignment03.html)
- [Assignment 04: Text Analytics using quanteda](Assignment04.html)

## Reflctions

- [Reflctions 01: AI, Originality, AGI, and Scientific Research](reflctions01.html)


## Labs

- [Lab 01: R Programming Basics I](Lab01.html)
- [Lab 02: R Programming Basics II](Lab02.html)
- [Lab ML01.R: Simple and Multiple Linear Regression](Lab ML01.R.html)
